name: Authoritative Multiplayer Tic-Tac-Toe
overview: A real-time multiplayer Tic-Tac-Toe game built using Nakama's authoritative server architecture. The project demonstrates server-authoritative game logic, matchmaking, real-time state synchronization, and scalable multiplayer backend development. Players can create or join matches and compete in a synchronized environment where all game rules are validated and executed on the server.
challenge: Designing an authoritative multiplayer architecture where all game logic is executed on the server while maintaining real-time synchronization, fairness, and low-latency gameplay.
projectDetails: Built authoritative multiplayer gameplay using Nakama server
Implemented server-side game logic and move validation
Created real-time match state synchronization between players
Developed matchmaking and match lifecycle management
Integrated React frontend with Nakama client SDK
Handled player joins, disconnects, reconnections, and match completion
Designed scalable multiplayer architecture following industry-standard game server practices

name: CoverDev
overview: An AI-powered tool that generates personalized cover letters instantly—just paste the job description.
challenge: Integrating AI language generation with a clean, intuitive UI while ensuring prompt and contextually accurate outputs.
projectDetails: Built with Nextjs and Tailwind CSS for a seamless user interface
Integrated AI-powered text generation (e.g., OpenAI API) for auto-generated cover letters
Ensured editable output with copy and download options
Deployed seamlessly on Vercel for fast, global access

name: JustSocial – Social Media Application
overview: A comprehensive and fully responsive social media platform designed for seamless interaction, real-time communication, and community engagement. It allows users to create posts, like, comment, and manage connections while staying updated with instant notifications and chats. The platform also supports profile customization and secure account management, making it a complete modern social networking solution.
challenge: Building a seamless real-time social experience with chat, post interactions, dynamic friend management, and scalable architecture.
projectDetails: Built with MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js)
Implemented real-time chat and notifications using WebSockets
Enabled image and text posts with like, comment, and share features
Added friend management system including requests, removal, and connections
Profile customization and account details management
Fully responsive design with light/dark mode themes using Material-UI
Secure authentication and session handling

name: iSee – Video Calling Application
overview: A real-time video calling platform designed for instant connections with live chat and privacy-focused features. iSee enables users to start video calls instantly using a unique code without the hassle of account creation or software installation. With its clean, responsive interface and seamless chat integration, iSee provides a hassle-free and private communication experience.
challenge: Creating a fast, privacy-first video communication system with instant call initiation, live chat, and a seamless user experience.
projectDetails: Developed using React.js for a dynamic and responsive front-end
Integrated WebRTC for real-time video calling with peer-to-peer communication
Implemented live chat functionality during calls using Socket.io
Enabled instant calls using unique session codes without requiring accounts or installations
Added customizable display names for enhanced privacy
Designed a user-friendly interface using Tailwind CSS for cross-device compatibility
